parameters.query: SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'architect_email'

SELECT json_build_object(
  'project_id', p.id,
  'project_name', p.name,
  'project_type', p.project_type,
  'property_type', p.property_type,
  'property_area_m2', p.property_area_m2,
  'location_address', p.location_address,
  'location_city', p.location_city,
  'location_province', p.location_province,
  'budget_target', p.budget_target,
  'started_at', p.started_at,
  'target_completion', p.target_completion,
  'client', json_build_object('name', c.name, 'email', pii_decrypt(c.email_enc), 'phone', pii_decrypt(c.phone_enc), 'notes', pii_decrypt(c.notes_enc))
) AS data
FROM projects p JOIN clients c ON c.id = p.client_id
WHERE p.id = $1::uuid;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ requests: [{ insertText: { location: { index: 1 }, text: $('Build Contract Content').first().json.body } }] }) }}

options.queryReplacement:
={{ [
  $('Build Contract Content').first().json.project_id,
  $('Build Contract Content').first().json.contract_type,
  $('Build Contract Content').first().json.title,
  JSON.stringify($('Build Contract Content').first().json.parties),
  $('Build Contract Content').first().json.template_used,
  ('https://docs.google.com/document/d/' + ($('Create Google Doc').first().json.id || '') + '/edit'),
  ($('Create Google Doc').first().json.id || ''),
  $('Build Contract Content').first().json.expires_at,
  $('Build Contract Content').first().json.amount_eur,
  $('Build Contract Content').first().json.scope,
  $('Build Contract Content').first().json.notes
] }}

parameters.subject: =ArquitAI — Contrato generado: {{ $json.title }}
parameters.message:
=

Contrato generado en borrador

{{ $('Build Contract Content').first().json.project_name }}

Tipo: {{ $('Build Contract Content').first().json.contract_type }}

Importe: {{ $('Build Contract Content').first().json.amount_eur || 'n/a' }} EUR

Estado: draft (revisalo, edita lo necesario y envíalo manualmente al firmante)

Abrir borrador en Google Docs

Cuando tengas el contrato firmado: POST /webhook/contract-signed con {contract_id, signer_email, signed_doc_url} y se marcara como signed automaticamente.

Contract ID: {{ $json.id }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({status:'created', contract_id: $('Insert Contract Row').first().json.id, title: $('Insert Contract Row').first().json.title, doc_url: 'https://docs.google.com/document/d/' + $('Create Google Doc').first().json.id + '/edit', expires_at: $('Insert Contract Row').first().json.expires_at}) }}

parameters.query: SELECT title_template, body_template FROM contract_templates WHERE contract_type = $1 AND is_active = true ORDER BY version DESC LIMIT 1;
